blocks.set_recipe_tooltip: Set the recipe for a machine
blocks.set_belt_speed_tooltip: Set the speed of a conveyor belt
blocks.repeat_times_tooltip: Repeat the enclosed actions a number of times
blocks.while_condition_tooltip: Repeat while the condition is true
blocks.if_quality_tooltip: Check item quality against a threshold
blocks.set_variable_tooltip: Set a variable to a value
blocks.get_variable_tooltip: Get the value of a variable
blocks.change_variable_tooltip: Change a variable by an amount
blocks.on_order_received_tooltip: Run when a new order is received
blocks.on_machine_idle_tooltip: Run when a machine becomes idle

level_1.name: First Part
level_1.description: Place a Fabricator, connect it to the Shipper with a belt, and produce your first wheels.

level_2.name: Assembly Line
level_2.description: Connect machines with belts and assemble your first robots.

level_3.name: Mass Production
level_3.description: Use loops to produce 10 parts efficiently.

level_4.name: Quality Matters
level_4.description: Use conditionals to route defective items to the recycler.

level_5.name: Smart Routing
level_5.description: Use variables and splitters to produce multiple robot types.

level_6.name: Custom Robots
level_6.description: Define functions to build three different robot models.

level_7.name: Rush Order!
level_7.description: React to events and meet a tight deadline.

level_8.name: Optimize Everything
level_8.description: Balance speed, cost, and quality to earn maximum stars.

level_9.name: Robot Expo
level_9.description: Sandbox showcase — build anything you want!

level_10.name: Factory Tycoon
level_10.description: Run a multi-line production facility for all robot types.

tutorial.level1_step1: Welcome! Double-click on the grid to place your first machine — a Fabricator.
tutorial.level1_step2: Double-click another cell to place a Shipper. Click it and change its type to Shipper.
tutorial.level1_step3: Connect them with a belt — drag from the Fabricator's output slot to the Shipper's input slot.
tutorial.level1_step4: Open the Editor to write your program. Click the code button or press E.
tutorial.level1_step5: Use the 'set recipe' block to choose what your machine produces. Drag it from the Machines category.
tutorial.level1_step6: Press Play and watch parts flow along the belt to the Shipper!
tutorial.level2_step1: This time you need multiple machines. Double-click to place a Fabricator and an Assembler.
tutorial.level2_step2: Connect machines with belts and route parts to the Shipper.
tutorial.level2_step3: Open the Editor and use 'set recipe' blocks to tell each machine what to produce.
tutorial.level3_step1: Open the Editor — you now have Loop blocks! Use 'repeat' to produce many parts efficiently.
tutorial.level3_step2: Loops repeat your instructions automatically, so you don't have to write the same blocks over and over.
tutorial.level4_step1: You have a new machine: Checker! Place it between your machines to check item quality.
tutorial.level4_step2: Use 'if quality' blocks in the Editor to route defective items away from good ones.
